title: Cole & Mason H33506P Cube Clear Salt Shaker and Pepper Mill Combi, Precision+, Acrylic, 145 mm, Duo Mill, Includes 1 x Salt Shaker/Pepper Grinder
features: A compact and stylish 2 in 1 pepper mill and salt shaker, made from high quality crystal clear acrylic and finished with a chrome shaker cap on top

Featuring Cole & Mason Precision mechanisms; carbon steel for pepper that strips peppercorns instead of crushing them, and diamond-sharp ceramic for salt, ensuring maximum flavour release from every turn
The Precision+ range mills feature a spring loaded mechanism - allowing a fully adjustable grind from fine to coarse

To clean, wipe with a damp cloth and use a clean cloth to dry We reco mmend you do not use any cleaning products as this can affect the finish of the product Do not i mmerse in water or place in a dishwasher

This Cole & Mason product is covered by our lifetime mechanism guarantee Should your mill not meet the high standards and expectations of Cole & Mason products we will be happy to replace your mill for an alternative of equivalent value Accidental breakage, poor care and damage from misuse are not covered
description: From the manufacturer Experts of Seasoning, Performance and Flavour Cole & Mason have been designing and developing kitchenware from the head office in England since 1919. Cole & Mason offer a well-established and intuitively designed range, with a product for every seasoning task, from the kitchen to the table. Whether you need a manual or electronic mill, simple shakers, dry or fresh herb and spice products, pestle and mortar or an oil and vinegar pourer; all products are manufactured with the highest quality materials and available in a wide range of finishes Cube Contemporary clear acrylic mill designed to optimise the refractive qualities of acrylic A unique mill with a contemporary look, to add style to any table whilst remaining an everyday kitchen tool. Made from high quality crystal clear acrylic and finished with chrome, the Cube range features individual salt and pepper mills, as well as a compact and stylish 2 in 1 pepper mill and salt shaker. Contemporary clear acrylic mill Available as individual mills or a combined pepper mill and salt shaker Featuring Cole & Mason Precision mechanisms Adjustable Grind Settings Easily to refill (mills come filled with salt and pepper) To clean, wipe with a damp cloth and use a clean cloth to dry Contemporary Clear Acrylic Mill A unique range of mills with a contemporary look, designed to optimise the refractive qualities of acrylic. Adjustable Grind Settings Adjust the grind by tightening or loosening the knob on top. Use a coarse setting for steaks or tomato salad, a medium setting for pizzas and a fine setting for soups and sauces. Precision + Mechanism Technology All our Precision+ mills come equipped with a sharp, corrode resistant ceramic mechanism in the salt mill and our brand new Precision+ mechanism in the pepper mill. Cole & Mason Precision+ mills represent a new level of performance: able to deliver more pepper per turn than ever before and scientifically tested to release more flavour. Peace of Mind All Cole & Mason salt and Pepper mill mechanisms are covered for their lifetime. Should your mill not meet the high standards and expectations of Cole & Mason products we will be happy to replace your mill for an alternative of equivalent value. Accidental breakage, poor care and damage from misuse are not covered. Durable, hard-wearing and elegantly simple The ideal salt and pepper mills for every household where the kitchen is the heart of the home. Perfectly seasoned and tasty food doesn't always need to be fancy and neither do the mills that provide the seasoning. Simple, stylish and serving their purpose exactly; keep them next to the oven within easy reach whilst cooking, or in the centre of the table during family meal times.
